originalTitle: Honest Trailers | The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
content: It’s the Honest Trailer for the Mario Galaxy Movie, a’ piece of candy coated cacca sure to please Nintendo fanboys, babies just starting to develop object permanence and literally no one else! Voice Narration: Jon Bailey the EPIC VOICE GUY (@epicvoiceguy on all socials) Title Design: Robert Holtby Written by: Spencer Gilbert Produced by: Spencer Gilbert Edited by: Kevin Williamsen Post-Production Manager: Emin Bassavand Manager, Video Operations: Tiffany Tse Post-Production Specialist: Rebecca Castaneda VP Content: Max Dionne #honesttrailers #entertainment #parody #trailer #funny #mario #nintendo #starfox
chineseTitle: | 诚 | 实 | 的 | 预 | 告 | 片 | | | 超 | 级 | 马 | 里 | 奥 | 银 | 河 | 电 | 影 |
chineseContent: 这是马里奥银河电影的诚实预告片，一块糖果涂层的卡卡肯定会取悦任天堂的粉丝，刚刚开始发展物体持久性的婴儿，而且实际上没有其他人！配音旁白：EPIC VOICE GUY Jon Bailey（所有社交账号均@epicvoiceguy） 标题设计：Robert Holtby 编剧：Spencer Gilbert 制作人：Spencer Gilbert 编辑：Kevin Williamsen 后期制作经理：Emin Bassavand 视频运营经理：Tiffany Tse 后期制作专家：Rebecca Castaneda 副总裁 内容：Max Dionne #honesttrailers #entertainment #parody #预告片#funny #mario #nintendo #starfox
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
